title: front-matter
content:
# Front Matter

Each article can include a **Front Matter** (in YAML format) at the beginning, used to provide metadata for the article, such as: title, date, tags, description, author, cover image, pinning, menu, etc.

## What is Front Matter

Front Matter is a YAML-formatted metadata block located at the beginning of a Markdown file, delimited by `---`. Kecare parses this metadata and passes it to theme components for use.

## Complete Example

Here is an example of Front Matter containing all commonly used fields:

```yaml
---
title: Writing Guide                 # Article title
date: 2025-11-19               # Publication date
tags:                          # Tag list
  - kecare
  - blog
  - tutorial
desc: This is a guide on how to write using Kecare  # Article summary
author: Author Name                 # Author name
coverSrc: "https://example.com/cover.webp"  # Cover image
sticky: 1                      # Sticky priority
menu: kecare-docs              # Belonging menu
translate: ['zh-CN', 'en-US', 'ja-JP']  # Translation languages, the first value must be the current language
---

Other fields will use default values, you can come back to fill them in at any time.
